title: lobelia gibbosa
intro: Lobelia gibbosa, also known as Blue Lobelia or Snowy Lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and parts of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lobelia gibbosa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
